brands.name: CPA Moms
brands.note: No documented state-availability evidence found (honest gap). Franchising since 2020 per cpamoms.com/franchise/; Entrepreneur directory listing (entrepreneur.com/franchises/directory/cpa-moms/336166) has an empty Available Territories section. Known franchises only in KY, TN, TX, FL, AZ, AK per company materials.

nationwide.note: Available Territories: "United States." Small system (2024 FDD: franchised locations in 7 states); Loyalty Brands company; franchisor site cr3franchise.com.

brands.name: Cabinet IQ

statesOpen.note: Franchisor territories page pitches expansion across Texas only

brands.note: Conflicting signals: franchisor's own territories page is Texas-focused, while third-party listings (Franchise.com, IFPG, America's Best Franchises) describe US-wide expansion with ~100 units; Franchise.com currently shows 'not accepting inquiries.' Only TX is documented by the franchisor.

nationwide.note: "Exclusive franchise territories in select high-demand markets across the US" - selective market-by-market sales; most states shown as 'Inquire for Available Markets.' IFPG (2025): currently focused on US development. Empower Brands company.

Accepts Expressions of Interest across the US (plus Canada and Puerto Rico). Unique operator model: $10K initial commitment, Chick-fil-A owns the location/real estate, no territory purchase or equity; highly selective (<1% of ~20K annual inquiries).

Available Territories: "United States" (listing data Dec 2022); development announced in FL, AZ, TX, TN, NC, UT, OH, CA, PR. Caveat: Franchise Times (Jan 2025) reports shift to 'quality over quantity' after store closures - verify current sales activity.
